principles: Talaria is the public product/entity; CYNIC is the sovereign judgment and observation engine.
Vercel is the public edge surface for the portal; the local containerized portal is the fallback relay when the edge is unavailable.
B&C owns chess gameplay and PoH evidence production; Talaria consumes selected B&C signals.
Telegram Public, Telegram Ops, Telegram Listener, X, B&C, CYNIC, and Vercel are separate surfaces.
Markdown files are historical projections, not runtime sources of truth.
Docker is the local container runtime for the portal fallback surface; Vercel is the public edge surface.

Containerized portal behind systemd and Docker Compose; serves the same operator UI as a local fallback when the edge is unavailable.
